chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-28 / 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ D/O MATTER. 1) For hearing of Misc. No. 6344/2024. 2) For hearing of Misc. No. 20586/2023. 23.04.2024. Mr. Ghulam Sarwar Korai, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Advocate General. Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate for Respondent. ________________ 1) Through this application, the Petitioner seeks release / discharge of sureties furnished pursuant to order passed on 10.01.2022 on the ground that subsequently, an order was passed whereby, penal surcharge was imposed and same has been paid to the department directly. Learned Cousnel for the Petitioner has referred to Letter annexed with this application and addressed to the Nazir of this Court by the Respondents in support of the stance taken by the Petitioner. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Nazir to discharge surety along with profit if any, as per rules. Application stands disposed of. 2) In view of the above, this application has become infructuous and is dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad
